note: Machine-readable transcript queue. Maintained by the watch-creators skill (agents): append in-scope videos whose transcript could not be read this run; remove a video ONLY after it was distilled or transcript-verified-skipped. Drained by the deterministic src/fetch-transcripts.mjs step when TRANSCRIPT_API_KEY is configured (25/run cap, free-tier budget). Seeded 2026-07-17 from the watch-creators log's pending section.
